case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KISHA MICKELS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICKELS, KISHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1810 26TH STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELS, KISHA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, ORDER AUTHORIZING SERVICE OF SUMMONS BY POSTING AMD MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-21-2011, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELS, KISHA DOES 1 TO 10
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELS, KISHA DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELS, KISHA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-21-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELS, KISHA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $34.90 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
